data.body:
Random memory unlocked today:

Sitting in my room with a borrowed CD of Fall Out Boy’s album Infinity On High playing in my silver Walkman.

Crying on the floor watching my ceiling fan spin as “Golden” plays, a little panicked flutter in my chest at the thought of being caught listening to them.
